# Volunteer Registration System

- Build with Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, MongoDB Atlas, and JWT auth.
- Keep the UI clean, dark, and minimal with a clear primary action.
- Preserve the public volunteer registration flow, admin login, admin dashboard, and report export routes.
- Prefer small, focused edits that keep the app easy to run and extend.
- Update README.md when setup, environment variables, or commands change.
